Rector

Dear Students,

Istanbul Galata University, a dynamic and modern learning environment where scientific excellence and an innovative educational approach converge, aims not only to provide our students with professional knowledge but also to prepare them as effective individuals in the global world. With our research and innovation-oriented education programs, we encourage our students to think critically, question, and develop creative solutions. We offer you the highest level of education and research opportunities with our expert and experienced academic staff.

Our university currently offers education through five faculties, one vocational school, and one graduate education institute, focusing on the core areas we call 4S1T: Art, Sports, Health, Social Sciences, and Technology. Dedicated to nurturing our students as ethical, virtuous professionals who uphold human rights, our university continues to grow and provide education aligned with 21st-century standards, keeping pace with global changes.

Through our internationalization policy, we provide our students with the opportunity to compete in the global arena and interact with diverse cultures. In this context, as Istanbul Galata University, we equip our students with the skills required by global digitalization, preparing them to meet the needs of the modern era.

As a city university in the heart of Istanbul, at the very center of a magnificent cultural and historical texture; we continue our education and research without compromising our values and mission. Within a framework that reflects the history and culture of our city, we equip young individuals with an education aligned with international standards, preparing them to compete on the global stage.

Istanbul Galata University, which adopts a contemporary, innovative, liberal, egalitarian, fair, rational and student-centered education policy, will continue to provide education and development at 21st century standards by following global changes.

I wish you, our esteemed students, a successful and fulfilling academic journey and sincerely congratulate you on becoming a member of the Istanbul Galata University family.

Best regards,

Prof. Dr. Şeyma AYDINOĞLU

Rector
